name: Hamburger Fischsalat (Hamburg-style Fish Salad
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------SAUCE-----------------------------------
2 tablespoons mayonnaise 1 teaspoon mustard; Dijon-style
2 tablespoons sour cream 1/2 teaspoon salt
2 teaspoons lemon juice 2 teaspoons pepper; white
----------------------------------GARNISH----------------------------------
1 large hard-cooked egg 4 canned beets; sliced
The fillets may be fresh or frozen. They can include cod, turbot,
or
1. Melt the butter in a frying pan.
2. Place the fish in the pan and pour over the hot water. Bring to a boil, cover, lower the heat, and simmer gently for 10 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, slice the hard-cooked eggs and pickles.
4. Drain the fish, cool it, and cut into cubes.
5. Prepare the salad sauce by blending mayonnaise, sour cream, lemon juice, mustard, salt, and pepper.
6. In a separate bowl, gently mix the fish cubes, egg, pickle slices, and capers.
7. Arrange the fish mixture in individual dishes and spoon the salad sauce over the top.
8. Chill for 30 minutes.
9. To garnish, cut the remaining egg into eight pieces and chop the beet slices.
10. Arrange the garnish on each serving.
11. Serve immediately.
